positive: A hyper-detailed, stylized illustration of a majestic, playful cosmic whale swimming through a bioluminescent nebula forest. The whale has iridescent, crystalline skin with gentle glows, trailing cosmic stardust. The background is a dreamy blend of deep sapphire blues, vibrant magenta pinks, and electric cyan, rendered in a clean, bold silhouette style with high contrast. Elements should include stylized floating planets, geometric floral patterns, and shimmering nebulae clouds. Central composition, perfect for a repeatable, print-on-demand textile pattern, vector art aesthetic, cinematic lighting, clean edges, volumetric glow, highly detailed, 8k.
